title: SBTE Result 2026 OUT

detail.title: SBTE Result 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: SBTE Bihar Result 2026 is OUT. Check your February 2026 semester exam results and download the marksheet PDF at sbte.bihar.gov.in. Direct link, steps to check result, and re-evaluation details are available here.

content.text: SBTE Bihar Result 2026 is OUT on the official website sbte.bihar.gov.in. The State Board of Technical Education, Bihar (SBTE Bihar) has declared the semester exam results for the examinations held in February 2026. Students who appeared for Semester I, II, III and V can now check their results and download the marksheet PDF online.

This page provides the direct SBTE Bihar Result 2026 link, complete step-by-step guide to check your result, how to download the marksheet, re-evaluation process, and all important details in one place. It is specially prepared for diploma and polytechnic students of SBTE Bihar to help them access their results quickly and without any confusion.

The State Board of Technical Education, Bihar (SBTE Bihar) has declared the various semester exam results on its official website. Students can get the direct link provided here and the steps to check the SBTE semester result 2026.
Direct Link for SBTE Result 2026: Click Here

rows: State Board of Technical Education, Bihar

content.text: The SBTE Bihar Result 2026 has been released for multiple semesters (I, II, III & V). Students can check their marks, percentage, and division using their roll number on the official portal.
Bihar SBTE students can check their semester results online at the board’s official website. Follow the steps mentioned below:

items: Visit the official website of the board – sbte.bihar.gov.in
Select the ‘Student’ section and click on the ‘Exam Result’ option available there.
Fill in the required information (Roll Number) and click on ‘Get Result’.
Check the results and download the PDF for future reference.

content.text: Any student who is dissatisfied with their SBTE results 2026 can apply for re-evaluation. In re-evaluation, the examiner re-checks the answer sheet and awards new marks if required. The re-evaluation window usually opens within 15–20 days after the result declaration. Students need to pay the SBTE re-evaluation fee online. Check the official notice on sbte.bihar.gov.in for exact dates and procedure.

items: Conducting Body: State Board of Technical Education, Bihar (SBTE Bihar)
Location: Patna, Bihar
Courses: 3-year / 6-semester Diploma and Polytechnic programmes
Result Mode: Online
Marksheet: Downloadable in PDF format
Established: 1955 under the Department of Science, Technology and Technical Education, Government of Bihar
